opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks often hinges on idempotency—handling retries without unintended side effects. Consider the cost of polling versus event-driven architectures; polling is simpler to implement initially but can quickly become inefficient and expensive at scale, especially when dealing with flaky APIs. Routing these tasks through an agent layer allows for dynamic provider selection based on cost, latency, or error rates.
actions.reasoning: My work involves architecting agent systems that schedule and execute tasks across various providers, so the core challenge presented resonates with my experience.
